title: Agent Coordination Host Limit Record v1
description: Contract for a machine and quota-host scoped usage-limit observation. This schema defines state only; reporting, persistence, provider detection, and UI behavior are separate concerns.

x-storage-key.workspace_machine_encoding: UTF-8 bytes; leave ASCII alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen; percent-encode every other byte with uppercase hexadecimal

workspace.description: Tenant/workspace dimension required by ADR 0004. Self-hosted producers use default.

canonical_host.description: Canonical quota-pool host identifier: trim and lowercase before writing; use ASCII letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen; omit scheme, port, path, account, and credential data. Equality is exact after canonicalization. Provider alias mapping is intentionally outside v1.

scope.description: Canonical provider-neutral quota window or limit class. Multiple scopes may coexist for one workspace, machine, and host.

observed_at.description: Time the limit was observed. Reset and clear updates retain the original observation time for this logical record.

resets_at.description: Known reset time, or null when unknown. An active record with a non-null reset at or before projection time is no longer effective.

cleared_at.description: Required only after explicit clear and not permitted on an active record.

host_limits.description: Optional status section. Each logical key appears at most once; consumers derive blocked-on-limit for lanes matching an effective record's workspace, machine, and host.
